name: Chicken or Turkey Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Ravy or 1 can Condensed cream
recipeInstructions: Use as much sliced or cubed chicken or turkey as desired. Partially cook frozen green beans. Arrange 2/3 cup Pepperidge Farm Seasoned Stuffing, green beans, and almonds in layers in a greased, shallow casserole. Pour over all milk. Moisten 1-1/3 cups Stuffing with 1/4 cup hot water and 2 tablespoons melted butter. Spread over casserole. Bake in a hot (400 degree) oven for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
